name: Delivery
text: The Supplier shall deliver the Goods to the Buyer at the delivery address specified in the Purchase Order or as mutually agreed. Delivery shall be deemed complete upon the Buyer's acknowledgement of physical receipt of the Goods.
title: Delivery
dispute_hotspots: Delivery address dispute — goods delivered to wrong location
Incoterms not specified — FOB vs CIF risk transfer ambiguity
Transit insurance — who bears risk during transport
Delay in delivery — liquidated damages enforceability under ICA S.74
